name: Tuna Roll Up
recipeIngredient: 1 can Mushroom soup diluted with 1/4 cup water
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna and break it into chunks.
2. Mix in lemon juice, celery, and mayonnaise.
3. Prepare the biscuit dough and roll out to about 1/4 inch thick.
4. Spread the tuna mixture over the dough and roll up as for a jelly roll, sealing the edges.
5. Cut into 1-inch slices.
6. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 425°F for about 15-20 minutes.
7. Serve with mushroom sauce. Alternatively, you can use one unopened can of biscuits, let it sit at room temperature for about half an hour, then punch all together and roll out.
